home.title: Train smarter. Book online.
home.subtitle: The all-in-one platform for personal trainers and their clients.

auth.emailTaken: An account with this email already exists.
auth.registerSuccess: Account created. You can now sign in.
auth.healthConsentLabel: I explicitly consent to the processing of my health and fitness data so my trainer can plan my sessions. I can withdraw this at any time.
auth.termsConsentLabel: I agree to the Terms of Service, including the 24-hour cancellation policy.

validation.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address.
validation.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
validation.consentRequired: This consent is required to continue.

cookies.message: We use essential cookies to make this site work. With your consent we also use cookies to understand usage. You can change this at any time.

privacy.title: Privacy & your data
privacy.intro: Manage your consents and exercise your data rights under UK GDPR.
privacy.healthDataDesc: Lets your trainer store notes about your health to plan sessions.
privacy.marketingDesc: Occasional updates and offers. You can opt out at any time.
privacy.exportDesc: Get a machine-readable copy of all the personal data we hold about you.
privacy.erasureDesc: Erase your personal data. Financial records are kept where the law requires, but anonymised.
privacy.erasureConfirm: This permanently anonymises your account. Continue?
privacy.erasureDone: Your data has been erased. You will be signed out.
